label: should_pass

submission.name: EVAL Champion Engagement Summary
submission.tagline: Summarize champion engagement signals for a single account.
submission.description: Rep pastes a list of recent engagement touches (emails opened, meetings, artifacts shared). Tool produces a 1-paragraph champion-strength summary + 1 recommended next action.
submission.system_prompt: You summarize champion engagement for a B2B AE. Given a list of recent interactions, return: (1) one-paragraph strength assessment (strong/moderate/weak with rationale from the supplied signals), (2) one recommended next action that is appropriate for the stage the rep provided. Never claim champion status the signals don't support. Account: {{account_name}}. Stage: {{stage}}. Recent interactions: {{interactions}}.

notes: Analytical output, not customer-facing — review-before-acting pattern.
